[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000100 1
1 1111111 a
2 1101001 4
3 1110100 4
4 0111011 5
5 0011101 4
6 0000000 a
7 0001110 3

01 10 1001111 5
12 21 0100110 3
23 32 0011101 4 match 5
34 43 0001110 3 match 7
45 54 1101010 4
56 65 0011011 4
67 76 0010110 3
70 07 0011101 4 match 5

02 20 1101001 4 match 2
13 31 0111011 5 match 4
24 42 0010011 3
35 53 1100100 3
46 64 1110001 4

71 17 1010010 3

03 30 1110100 4 match 3

36 63 1111111 a match 1
47 74 1100111 5
50 05 0010000 1
61 16 1000100 2
72 27 1110100 4 match 3
